summary: Fix Tier 1 accuracy gaps then launch public evaluate flow

steps.title: Inventory Tier1 accuracy issues
steps.notes: Confirmed blockers via fresh Tier1 eval run (doc count 10, metadata receipt missing prior) and captured verification notes.

steps.title: Patch docs & CLI to match reality
steps.notes: CLI now emits metadata.json and Tier1 doc highlights it; aligns doc promises with actual artifacts.

steps.title: Re-run prototype with receipts
steps.notes: Validated flow end-to-end after fixes; receipts stored under onboarding usage + artifacts tree.

steps.title: Publish public-facing entry
steps.notes: Tier 1 evaluate doc is now linked from README + onboarding landing so external observers have a canonical entry.
